note: Official HKU Faculty of Education curriculum page confirms the 300-credit BEd in Early Childhood Education and Special Education structure, including a 246-credit professional core, specialised electives, language enhancement, common core and AI literacy. It publishes examples of core and elective course names but not a stable coded course table or a semester-by-semester curriculum. Do not infer course codes from names; keep this programme as index/source-only until a public coded curriculum source is available.

Official HKU Faculty of Education curriculum page confirms the five-year BA and BEd English programme's degree components and credit totals, including English Language and Linguistics, professional core, practicum, common core and electives. The public page does not provide a stable coded course list or semester-by-semester table, and its linked programme pamphlet is not publicly retrievable through the source endpoint. Keep this programme as index/source-only until an official coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and Faculty of Science pages publish the 30-credit Common Year One structure, including named faculty compulsory, professionals-in-society, GUR and free-elective components, for five potential majors. However, the public curriculum pages do not provide stable subject codes or a semester-by-semester coded table. Do not infer codes from subject names or assign courses from individual science programmes to this umbrella scheme. Keep JS3008 as index/source-only until a public coded Common Year One curriculum is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and Faculty of Humanities pages confirm that Humanities is a Common Year One entry scheme with four potential majors and programme selection after Year One. The public pages do not publish a stable coded table for the shared first-year curriculum. Courses verified for Chinese History and Culture, English and Applied Linguistics, Language Science and Technology, and Speech Therapy must remain bound to their respective programmes, not assigned to the umbrella scheme. Keep JS3007 as index/source-only until a public coded Common Year One curriculum is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and FCMS curriculum pages confirm that Computer and Mathematical Sciences is a Common Year One entry scheme with seven potential majors and a competitive programme-selection process. The public pages do not publish a stable coded table for the shared first-year curriculum. Courses already verified for the underlying Applied Mathematics, Computing and AI, and Data Science schemes must remain bound to their respective programmes, not assigned to the umbrella scheme. Keep JS3006 as index/source-only until a public coded Common Year One curriculum is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page confirms that Engineering is a common-entry scheme with sixteen potential majors and a Common Year One before programme selection. It provides no stable coded table for the shared first-year curriculum. Individual programme pages have different progression paths, credits and prerequisites, so their courses must not be assigned to the umbrella scheme. Keep this scheme as index/source-only until a public coded Common Year One curriculum is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page confirms that Construction and Environment is a common-entry scheme with nine potential majors and a Common Year One before programme selection. It does not publish a stable coded table for the shared first-year curriculum. The individual major pages and secondary-major/minor structures have different requirements, so their courses must not be assigned to the umbrella scheme. Keep this scheme as index/source-only until a public coded Common Year One curriculum is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page confirms that Interdisciplinary Studies is a flexible university scheme in which students design their own Major under a curriculum framework, with a graduation range of 120 to 150 credits. The public page provides no stable course-code table or single required-course list because individual study pathways differ. Keep this scheme as index/source-only and do not assign courses from other programmes to it.

Official PolyU JUPAS page confirms the 2026 four-year Building Engineering and Management degree, Common Year One, 121 academic credits plus 2 training credits, work-integrated education and accreditation. Publicly searchable coded subject records belong to separate SPEED or senior-year programmes with different programme codes and entry structures, so they cannot be assigned to JS3791. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current four-year coded curriculum source is publicly available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and programme pages confirm the 2026 four-year Surveying degree, Common Year One, five discipline choices, compulsory work-integrated education, capstone project and broad curriculum structure. The publicly accessible pages direct students to the department for subject information but do not publish a current stable subject-code table or semester-by-semester course rows. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a publicly accessible coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page describes the 2026 entry scheme, awards, curriculum structure and selected subject names, but does not publish stable subject codes or semester-by-semester course rows on the public page. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BME programme/curriculum pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit structure and broad requirement groups for Sports Science and Technology, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table for the programme. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and BEEE programme/brochure pages describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 11 training-credit structure, curriculum progression and broad building sciences subjects, but the public pages and image-based brochure do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS page and ARCH programme page describe the 2026 entry award, 120-credit plus 2 training-credit structure, 87-credit major subjects, GUR, free electives, capstone and broad architectural competence areas, but the public pages do not publish stable subject codes or a course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and FSN programme pages describe the 2026 entry scheme, common Year One, two major awards, 120-credit structure, WIE and broad subject areas. The linked programme requirement document redirects to PolyU single sign-on, so the public source does not provide a verifiable coded course table. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a publicly accessible coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS, School of Nursing programme-structure pages and the 2025 programme pamphlet confirm the five-year Mental Health Nursing curriculum, course areas, clinical practice and graduation credits. The publicly accessible materials list subject names but do not publish a current, complete coded subject table tied to JS3337. Older exchange and examination records cannot be used as the current curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and HTI pages describe the 2026 entry programme, four-year curriculum progression, 126 academic credits plus 10 clinical/field credits, clinical attachment and current subject names by year. The public subject-information link does not provide a current coded subject table; searchable coded records are from older curricula and cannot be treated as the 2026 curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and School of Design pages confirm the 2026 Design Scheme, its common Year 1 foundation, Year 2 clusters and nine Year 3-4 specialisms. The public structure and specialism pages give curriculum descriptions and credit groups but do not publish a current coded subject table. The specialisms have dedicated pathways, so subjects from older or individual-track materials must not be assigned across the scheme. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and HTI pages confirm the 2026 four-year Radiography curriculum, its academic and clinical components, 116 academic credits plus 26 clinical/field credits, and the Medical Imaging and Radiation Therapy concentrations. The linked subject-information page does not provide a current coded subject table. Searchable examination records are from older curricula and cannot be treated as the 2026 curriculum. Keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and Rehabilitation Sciences pages confirm the 2026 four-year Occupational Therapy curriculum, named subject areas by year, 130 credits including 24 clinical/field credits, and five clinical-placement blocks. The public sources do not provide a current complete coded subject table. Searchable examination records cannot alone establish the 2026 curriculum, so keep this programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

Official PolyU JUPAS and School of Nursing pages confirm the 2026 five-year Nursing curriculum, 117 academic credits plus 35 clinical/field credits and its broad subject areas. A publicly listed coded table belongs to the separate three-year senior-year-admission programme, with different entry requirements and credits, so it cannot be assigned to JS3648. Keep the five-year programme as index/source-only until a current coded curriculum source is available.

The official 2025-26 Handbook publishes 57 units across 14 fixed coded courses, including the 6-unit ITS3005 Internship and two 6-unit Honours Project courses. It separately requires 36 units of Personalised Knowledge and Skills selected, with an Academic Supervisor and approval, from any HKBU courses except those offered by the School of Chinese Medicine. That open, student-specific component has no stable exhaustive code pool; the Programme page also does not publish closed code lists for University Core, General Education or Free Electives. Publishing only the 14 fixed courses would misrepresent this highly individualised curriculum as complete. Keep JS2950 index/source-only until an official versioned source defines a complete Programme-specific pool; the 2026-27 Handbook is currently access-restricted.

The official 2026-27 Bachelor of Psychology admissions page and Programme leaflet describe the current Programme but publish no coded curriculum, per-course credits or requirement-group table. The current Department of Psychology undergraduate page still links only the 2023-24 Regulations and Syllabus and the 2023-24 recommended pathway. Those older files contain a complete coded structure for that cohort, but no current official evidence states that their course codes, titles, credits and groups remain applicable to 2026-27. Keep 6705 index/source-only until HKU publishes current regulations or explicitly confirms the older structure remains in force.

The current EdUHK admissions page, FHM Programme page and 2026-27 prospectus confirm that A5B109 is a five-year, 156-credit-point co-terminal double degree, including 71 credit points of Major studies, 30 Education Studies, 22 Field Experience, 18 General Education, 9 Language Enhancement, 6 Final Year Project and a compulsory 2-credit-point internship. They do not publish a current course-by-course table of codes, titles, credits or assignments to Core, Elective, Education Major, Field Experience and Final Year Project groups. Individual FHM course outlines and predecessor single-degree curricula do not establish membership in this double degree. Keep JS8005 index/source-only until EdUHK publishes an authenticated current coded curriculum.

The official 2026-27 Major Programme Requirement publishes the 66-unit structure, 11 required CHLL codes and four Specialty elective code groups, but the official 2026-27 Course Offerings page exposes only 19 unique CHLL codes and does not verify current titles and units for the remaining curriculum pool. The Major Requirement also repeats CHLL3402 in the Modern Chinese Literature list, so the complete current code pool cannot be reconciled without inference. Keep JS4018 index-only and do not publish an annual offering subset as the full Major curriculum.
